text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 26 

EM_EVENTS 

LABEL: Evaluation and Management Events 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of events for the Part B evaluation and management (E/M) services for a given 
year. An event is defined as each line item that contains the relevant service. 

E/M claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files, and a subset of physician 
claims. The E/M
